name: the conformance auditor flags a reading-source missing its source header
command:
mkdir -p generated-code-quality-standards/google
printf %s 'rules: []
recommended_set: []
all_set: []
' > generated-code-quality-standards/google/headerless.yaml
bash $CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/detectors/audit-citation-conformance.sh --root .
